title: IRGC: 25 ships Hormuz in 24h May 23 — down from 35
snippet: IRGC Navy said at least 25 commercial vessels including oil tankers and container ships transited Hormuz in 24 hours on May 23, after obtaining IRGC permission and coordination.
tag_reason: Update: daily transit count for May 23 (25 ships, down from 35 on May 22).
